hs_code.description: Pharmaceutical preparations HS code per trade agreement TA-2024-MS

incoterms.description: Delivered At Place — required per distribution contract DC-2024-12

consignee_name.description: Consignee must include the MedSupply Asia legal entity name

port_of_loading.description: Origin port per supplier agreement SA-IN-022 (GMP-certified facility)

port_of_discharge.description: Destination port per routing agreement RA-SG-007

shipment_mode.description: Air freight required for pharmaceutical cold-chain compliance CC-2024-MS

origin_country.description: Goods must originate from India per GMP-certified supplier SA-IN-022

invoice_number.description: Invoice number must use the MedSupply prefix MS- per billing procedure BP-MS-001
